strategies.name: Semantic Clustering
strategies.description: Group agent sessions by semantic role/purpose cluster for cross-cluster performance comparison
strategies.key_finding: Security agents: 95%, Code Review: 91%, Development: 73%, Smoke Tests: 18% (expected skips)
strategies.recommendation: Keep - reveals clear performance differences by agent role

strategies.name: Pipeline Iteration Depth Analysis
strategies.description: Track total agent sessions per branch across days; correlate iteration count with task complexity and success rate
strategies.key_finding: Focused-scope branches (fix-yaml: 83%, update-cli-mcp: 37%) dramatically outperform complex feature branches (feature-allow-templating: 4%). Iteration depth predicts task complexity.
strategies.recommendation: Keep - useful for identifying hard tasks early; combine with task-scope classification

strategies.name: Agent Role Performance Matrix
strategies.description: Cross-analyze each agent type against task category (coding, review-trigger, CI) to identify true value-producers vs structural pipeline overhead
strategies.key_finding: Stark binary divide: coding agents ('Addressing comment', 'Running Copilot') achieve 100% success; review-trigger bots (Scout, Q, /cloclo, PR Nitpick, Security) achieve 0% by design. Grumpy Code Reviewer at 50% is the only meaningful mid-tier. Matrix immediately distinguishes productivity from process overhead.
strategies.recommendation: Keep and expand - schedule matrix snapshot weekly to detect agent drift; combine with branch complexity classification from Pipeline Iteration Depth strategy

strategies.name: Branch Abandonment Risk Scoring
strategies.description: Score branches by session count and Copilot agent presence to distinguish 'awaiting human' stalls from active work
strategies.key_finding: Branches with >10 sessions and zero Copilot agent activity are awaiting human review/approval, not failing. Branches with Copilot agent sessions (even 0% success so far) are actively being worked.
strategies.recommendation: Keep and refine - add PR merge rate tracking to confirm whether high-review-bot branches eventually merge
